descriptionZh: 制造空间与加工实验室规则

spacingOverrides.reason: Wider corridors needed for transporting large materials and finished prototypes
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: 需要更宽的走廊以运输大型材料和成品原型

spacingOverrides.reason: Secondary aisles must accommodate material carts and equipment dollies
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: 次通道必须容纳材料推车和设备台车

spacingOverrides.reason: Machine tool zones need wider safety buffers for operator movement
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: 机床区域需要更宽的安全缓冲区以适应操作人员活动

ventilationOverrides.reason: CNC machining, laser cutting, and 3D printing generate significant particulate and VOCs
ventilationOverrides.reasonZh: CNC加工、激光切割和3D打印产生大量颗粒物和挥发性有机物

ventilationOverrides.reason: Soldering, adhesive use, and paint spraying require local exhaust ventilation
ventilationOverrides.reasonZh: 焊接、胶粘剂使用和喷漆需要局部排风

additionalAdjacency.reason: Raw materials and tool storage must be directly accessible from fabrication area
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: 原材料和工具储存必须从加工区域直接可达

additionalAdjacency.reason: Noise and dust from machining operations should not reach quiet work areas
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: 机加工操作的噪音和粉尘不应影响安静工作区域

additionalAdjacency.reason: Machine noise levels (75-95 dB) exceed acceptable meeting room ambient levels
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: 机器噪音水平（75-95 dB）超过会议室可接受的环境噪音水平

additionalAdjacency.reason: Visitors and mentors can observe prototyping progress through sound-isolated viewing windows
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: 访客和导师可通过隔音观察窗观察原型制作进度

additionalSpacing.descriptionZh: 激光切割机最小墙壁间距

additionalSpacing.description: Noise barrier minimum STC rating between makerspace and adjacent occupied zones
additionalSpacing.descriptionZh: 制造空间与相邻人员活动区域之间隔声屏障最低STC等级

additionalSafety.description: Dust collection system required for woodworking and CNC areas
additionalSafety.descriptionZh: 木工和CNC区域需要配备除尘系统

additionalSafety.description: Emergency stop buttons within 2m reach of every machine tool
additionalSafety.descriptionZh: 每台机床2米范围内需配备紧急停止按钮

notes: Makerspaces must implement a dust collection system meeting NFPA 652 standards. Noise levels must be monitored; hearing protection zones should be marked at 85 dB threshold per OSHA 1910.95.
notesZh: 制造空间必须实施符合NFPA 652标准的除尘系统。噪音水平须持续监测；根据OSHA 1910.95，85 dB阈值处应标记听力保护区域。
